Description

Gyeon Q²M PPF Wash is an effective decontamination shampoo that can dissolve fine metallic deposits from all vehicle wraps and paints without the need for a clay bar. 

Although highly effective against metal contamination on polyurethane films, Gyeon Q²M PPF Wash is a safe shampoo for all exterior surfaces. Its formula ensures rich foam formation, providing thorough cleaning for the entire vehicle, whether coated or not.

Gyeon Q²M PPF Wash is a 3-in-1 product: it cleans, decontaminates, and restores the original properties of your PPF or vinyl film. It can be used as a foam or traditional shampoo, making it a versatile maintenance solution for your vehicle.

Features

- Mixing ratio: 1:500

- Consumption: 20 - 30 ml / per vehicle
